name: Modular Storage Drawer Set Blue - Brightroom™
description:
Store craft supplies, notepads and more with the Modular Storage Drawer Set from Brightroom™. This blue storage drawer set features four drawers in varying-sizes to give you enough space for your essentials. Made of post-consumer recycled plastic, this set has a cutout at the front for easy drawer opening. You can place it in your study, vanity area, or other spots to organize your essentials.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.

Small Drawer Width: 6.15 inches
Small Drawer Height: 3.1 inches
Small Drawer Depth: 10.4 inches
Medium Drawer Width: 6.15 inches
Medium Drawer Height: 6.2 inches
Medium Drawer Depth: 10.4 inches
Large Drawer Width: 12.3 inches
Large Drawer Height: 3.1 inches
Large Drawer Depth: 10.4 inches
Overall Width: 12.3 inches
Overall Height: 9.3 inches
Overall Depth: 10.4 inches
